Scenario.title: Operation Wocao: Complex Attack on Communications Industry
Scenario.overview: Communications Complex Operation Wocao employs expert-level tactics to infiltrate and disrupt communications networks, involving multiple stages from reconnaissance to impact.

threat_actor_profile.motivation: Espionage and disruption of global communications

Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Internal network, End-user devices
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Phishing, Vulnerability exploit, Web, Remote Desktop Protocol

stage.name: Reconnaissance
stage.description: The attackers gather information about target communications infrastructure using publicly available sources.

stage.name: Resource Development
stage.capec: CAPEC ID: 522 - Malicious Hardware Component Replacement
stage.description: The attackers establish command and control servers to facilitate further operations.

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attackers send spear-phishing emails with malicious attachments to targeted employees, exploiting a file upload vulnerability to gain initial access to the network.

Scenario.summary: Operation Wocao demonstrates a complex, multi-stage attack against the communications industry, leveraging advanced techniques and tools to achieve unauthorized access and potential disruption of services.
